name: Hoffmann Commercial Real Estate Farmers' Market
notes: Could not verify a legitimate, distinctly-branded farmers market operating in Avon, CO at 182 Avon Rd. The on-file website (edwardsfarmersmarket.com) is dead (DNS does not resolve). 182 Avon Rd is a commercial retail building (current tenants: Christy Sports Ski & Patio, Southside Benderz restaurant) per LoopNet/Yelp listings; no evidence a weekly farmers market event is held there. The record name 'Hoffmann Commercial Real Estate Farmers' Market' traces back only to a Foraged.com listing that appears to attribute the property manager's name (Hoffmann Commercial Real Estate manages multiple Avon properties including Chapel Square and likely 182 Avon Rd) as the market name -- this looks like a scraping/data artifact rather than an actual official market brand, and no corroborating official source (town of Avon, Avon Chamber, social media) confirms it. The genuinely real, well-documented market in this immediate area is the 'Edwards Corners Farmers Market' at 57 Edwards Access Rd / Edwards West Plaza, Edwards, CO 81632 (Saturdays 9am-1pm, June-September, official page: edwards-colorado.com/farmer-s-market, phone 414-975-5952, email shawandassoc@sbcglobal.net, Instagram @edwardsfarmersmarket) -- but the Edwards Metropolitan District's own page explicitly states it is NOT the market operator and that market is located in Edwards, not Avon, so its facts were not attributed to this Avon record per instructions to only use facts clearly stated for the Avon market specifically. Separately, 'R Farmers' Market & Kitchen' at 51 Beaver Creek Pl, Avon, CO is a year-round retail grocery/deli store (open 7 days/week) rather than a seasonal outdoor farmers market event, so it was not treated as a match either. Recommend manual verification/removal of this record or re-confirmation with the data source, since no field could be confirmed via a legitimate official source for an Avon-specific market.
